# DigitalDukandar Pricing Plans

> DigitalDukandar is a free ecommerce website builder for Indian sellers. All plans include 0% transaction fees — we never take a cut of your sales.

## Free / Starter Plan — ₹0 Forever

No credit card required. No trial period. No expiry.

**Included in the free plan:**
- Free store subdomain (yourstore.digitaldukandar.in)
- Full product catalogue (add unlimited products)
- Shopping cart and checkout
- UPI, card, and net banking payments via Razorpay
- Cash on Delivery (COD) support
- WhatsApp order notifications
- Shiprocket shipping integration
- Basic analytics dashboard
- AI Store Designer (limited generations)
- 0% platform transaction fee

**Free plan is ideal for:** New sellers, small businesses, Instagram sellers moving to their own store, and anyone who wants to start selling online without any upfront cost.

---

## Pro Plan — Paid (Monthly or Yearly in INR)

Everything in Free, plus:
- Connect your own custom domain (e.g. yourstore.in)
- Advanced analytics and sales reports
- Priority customer support
- More AI Designer token generations
- Extended product and order limits
- Discount codes and coupon management
- Abandoned cart recovery

**Pro plan is ideal for:** Growing businesses that need a custom domain, deeper analytics, and more design control.

---

## Enterprise Plan — Custom Pricing

Everything in Pro, plus:
- Dedicated support
- High-volume order limits
- Custom integrations on request
- SLA-backed uptime

**Enterprise plan is ideal for:** High-volume stores, D2C brands, and businesses needing custom infrastructure.

---

## Why DigitalDukandar vs Shopify, Wix, Dukaan?

| Feature | DigitalDukandar | Shopify | Wix | Dukaan |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Free plan with selling | Yes — permanently | No (14-day trial) | No (ecommerce locked) | Very limited |
| UPI payments | Built-in | Third-party only | Third-party only | Built-in |
| COD support | Built-in | Limited | Limited | Built-in |
| WhatsApp orders | Built-in | No | No | No |
| Shiprocket shipping | Built-in | Plugin required | Not available | Not available |
| AI Store Designer | Built-in | No | Basic | No |
| Transaction fee | 0% | 0.5%–2% | None | None |
| Starting monthly cost | ₹0 | ~₹1,994 | ~₹599 (no selling) | Paid |
| Made for India | Yes | No | No | Yes |

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Is the free plan really free forever?**
Yes. No time limit, no trial. You can run your entire store on the free plan indefinitely. Upgrade only when you need a custom domain or advanced features.

**Q: Does DigitalDukandar charge transaction fees?**
No. DigitalDukandar charges 0% transaction fees on all plans. Your only payment cost is the Razorpay gateway fee (standard market rates).

**Q: Can I accept UPI payments on the free plan?**
Yes. UPI, cards, net banking, and COD are all available on the free plan.

**Q: Do I need a credit card to sign up?**
No credit card required for the free plan.

---

Start your free store: [https://digitaldukandar.in/auth](https://digitaldukandar.in/auth)
